4	Stefan G eorgi
MODULE 8	Writing Killer Headlines
ANYWAYS, LET’S TALK
ABOUT HEADLINES!
“GOOD COPY SPEAKS TO THE
BLEEDING NECK FIRST”
- Perry Marshall
I agree but it should also evoke curiosity as well.
From my experience dissecting a TON of headlines…
There are really 7 key elements that you’ll find.
HEADLINE ELEMENTS
CHECKLIST:
1. 	CURIOSITY
2. 	CALL OUT PAIN POINT
3. 	PROMISE SOLUTION
4. 	SPECIFICITY
5. 	CREDIBILITY/ADDRESS SKEPTICISM
6. 	TIME FRAME TO ACHIEVE RESULTS
OF PROMISE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 16 --

5	Stefan G eorgi
MODULE 8	Writing Killer Headlines
“I’M ALWAYS LOOKING FOR A HOOK IN MY ADS
(AND ESPECIALLY IN THE HEADLINES) THAT WILL
JAR THE READER AWAKE. I WANT EVERY AD TO BE
THE ONE THING HE READS THAT STAYS WITH HIM
ALL DAY LONG. HE TELLS HIS FRIENDS ABOUT IT. IT
HAUNTS HIM, CAUSES HIM TO SHAKE HIS HEAD IN
WONDER, GOOSES HIS BRAIN AND GETS HIS
BLOOD FLOWING.”
- John Carlton
LET’S DIVE RIGHT INTO
SOME EXAMPLES:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

6	Stefan G eorgi
MODULE 8	Writing Killer Headlines
EXAMPLE 1:
Curiosity:
• 	One Legged Golfer
Call Out Pain Point:
• 	Hooks and slices
Promise Solution:
• 	Adds 50 Yards To Your Drives, Eliminates Hooks and Slices
• 	Slash Up To 10 Strokes From Your Game
• 	Load every drive with 200% more explosive power
• 	Nailing shot-after-shot exactly where you want it, as accurate as clockwork
• 	Knocking a pile of strokes off your next round
Specificity:
• 	50 yards
• 	Slash up to 10 strokes
• 	200% more explosive power
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 16 --

7	Stefan G eorgi
MODULE 8	Writing Killer Headlines
Simplicity:
• 	If a one-legged golfer can do it, so can you.
Credibility/Address Skepticism:
• 	Impossible? Not if you believe what lifelong professionals and hot new
amateurs worldwide are now saying.
Time Frame To Achieve Results of Promise:
• 	Almost Overnight.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 16 --

8	Stefan G eorgi
MODULE 8	Writing Killer Headlines
EXAMPLE 2:
Curiosity:
• 	Naked Girls
• 	Little Pudgy Guy
• 	Fight With 3 Enormous Bikers
Call Out Pain Point:
• 	The opposite sex is laughing behind your back because you’re little and
pudgy.
Promise Solution:
• 	Not in the headline but very early in the lead.
Specificity:
• 	3 Enormous Bad-Ass Bikers.
• 	It’s not “Girls Laughed Behind His back” it’s “The Naked Girls All Laughed
Behind The Little Pudgy Guy’s Back”.
Simplicity:
• 	Not in the headline but very early in the lead, a few easy-to-master-secrets.
Credibility/Address Skepticism:
• 	Not really.
Time Frame To Achieve Results of Promise:
• 	No, but pretty early into the lead promise of “pretty much overnight” again.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 16 --

9	Stefan G eorgi
MODULE 8	Writing Killer Headlines
EXAMPLE 3:
Curiosity:
• 	Gin Soaked Raisins
Call Out Pain Point:
• 	“Hopeless” Arthritis
Promise Solution:
• 	Cured
Specificity:
• 	Kitchen Cure #619
Simplicity:
• 	Kitchen Cure
• 	Gin Soaked Raisins
Credibility/Address Skepticism:
• 	No
Time Frame to Achieve Results of Promise:
• 	No
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

10	Stefan G eorgi
MODULE 8	Writing Killer Headlines
EXAMPLE 4:
Curiosity:
• 	1,500 Year Old Himalayan Secret
Call Out Pain Point:
• 	Sexual Problems
Promise Solution:
• 	Boosts sex drive
• 	Increases stamina
• 	Promotes stronger, longer-lasting erections, and more
Specificity:
• 	1,500-Year-Old Himalayan Secret
Simplicity:
• 	Not Really.
Credibility/Address Skepticism:
• 	Scientists
Time Frame To Achieve Results of Promise:
• 	Not really
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

11	Stefan G eorgi
MODULE 8	Writing Killer Headlines
EXAMPLE 5:
Curiosity:
• 	Secret West African Red Tea
Call Out Pain Point:
• 	Hunger Cravings
Promise Solution:
• 	Proven to stop hunger cravings in their tracks
• 	Helps you shed one pound of fat every 72 hours
Specificity:
• 	Melt Away up to 1 pound of FAT every 72 hours
• 	West African Red Tea
Simplicity:
• 	Red Tea
Credibility/Address Skepticism:
• 	“Proven” but that’s about it.
Time Frame To Achieve Results of Promise:
• 	One pound of fat every 72 hours.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

MODULE 8	Writing Killer Headlines
EXAMPLE 6:
Curiosity:
• 	Humiliating high school reunion
• 	BioHarmony Switch
Call Out Pain Point:
• 	Endless Dieting, Exercising, and Counting Calories
• 	Battle with Waistline
Promise Solution:
• 	Win the battle with Her Waistline
• 	Melt the fat away
• 	Restore their slender body
• 	Make friends green with envy
Specificity:
• 	Women over 35
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

MODULE 8	Writing Killer Headlines
Simplicity:
• 	“Switch”
• 	“Simple solution”
Credibility/Address Skepticism:
• 	Used by hundreds of women across the country
Time Frame To Achieve Results of Promise:
• 	No (but intentional due to compliance).

MODULE 8	Writing Killer Headlines
EXAMPLE 7:
Call Out Pain Point:
• 	No
Promise Solution:
• 	Rewind the aging process
• 	Going back in time to the best version of yourself
• 	A real-life Fountain of Youth
• 	Youth-preserving
Specificity:
• 	22 Nobel Prize Winning Scientists
• 	$100,000 per year
(NOTE: I bet if I did $103,000 per year or $97,000 per year it would be better)
